hero.heading: Your Monthly Jewelry Edit.
hero.body: Curated by our editors. Personalized to your style. Starting at just $48 per month with over $100 in value, always.

steps.title: Take the Style Quiz
steps.body: Tell us about your personal style, metal preferences, and the pieces you reach for most. Our algorithm builds your style profile in under two minutes.
steps.detail: We learn what you love, from gold versus silver to everyday minimal versus statement pieces.

steps.title: We Curate Your Box
steps.body: Our editorial team handpicks three to five pieces around a monthly theme, tailored to your profile. Each box is different. Each piece is intentional.
steps.detail: Think of it as having a personal jewelry buyer who knows your taste better than you do.

steps.title: Unbox and Wear
steps.body: Your box arrives beautifully packaged every month. Keep what you love, wear it everywhere, and know your next edit is already being assembled.
steps.detail: Do not love a month? Skip it entirely with no charge and no guilt.

benefits.title: Exclusive Member Pricing
benefits.body: Get 20 to 50 percent off retail on every piece in your box. Members save an average of $340 per year on fine jewelry.

benefits.title: Early Access to Drops
benefits.body: Shop new collections 48 hours before anyone else. Limited editions arrive first in the member inbox.

benefits.title: Premium Materials Only
benefits.body: Solid gold vermeil, 14k gold-fill, and sterling silver. No flimsy plating. No shortcuts.

benefits.title: VIP Birthday Perks
benefits.body: A complimentary piece from the archive, delivered in your birthday month.

benefits.title: Skip or Cancel Anytime
benefits.body: Pause or skip in one click. No contracts, fees, or awkward offboarding.

benefits.title: 12-Month Warranty
benefits.body: Every piece is covered for a full year. If anything disappoints, it gets replaced.

tiers.name: Glow
tiers.summary: Solid gold vermeil staples, classic wearable designs, and an easy entry into the stack.

tiers.name: Haze
tiers.summary: Mixed metals, one semi-precious stone accent, and a styling guide in every shipment.

tiers.name: Dusk
tiers.summary: A guaranteed statement piece, collaboration access, and the most gift-worthy monthly edit.

tiers.name: Lune
tiers.summary: Premium 14k gold-fill, archive piece inclusions, and personal stylist guidance.

comparison.member: 20 to 50 percent off retail on every piece

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.quote: Every box has been worth far more than what I pay. The quality feels on par with pieces I bought for three times the price.

testimonials.name: Jessica L.
testimonials.quote: The skip feature is a game-changer. I skipped one month and came back to the most stunning gold hoops in January.

testimonials.name: Priya K.
testimonials.quote: I gifted a membership and now my sister texts me every unboxing. It became our favorite recurring gift.

faqs.question: How does the membership work?
faqs.answer: Choose your box tier, take the two-minute style quiz, and your first curation begins. Boxes ship on the fifteenth and can be skipped, paused, or canceled from the dashboard.

faqs.question: What kind of jewelry is included?
faqs.answer: We use premium materials only: gold vermeil, 14k gold-fill, sterling silver, and select semi-precious stones depending on the tier.

faqs.question: Can I really skip or cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes. There are no contracts, minimum commitments, or fees. Skip a month with one click before your billing cutoff.

faqs.question: What if I do not like what I receive?
faqs.answer: Members get free 30-day returns for store credit, and feedback is folded into future curations.

faqs.question: Can I gift a membership?
faqs.answer: Yes. Gift memberships are available in 3, 6, and 12 month options, and the recipient completes the style quiz themselves.

finalCta.heading: Your First Box is Waiting.
finalCta.body: Join thousands of members who wake up to jewelry they did not know they needed, but now cannot live without.
